zh.lifeSummary: 當William Strickland於大約1330年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.44歲，母親Cecily Welles30歲。他和Isabel Warcop至少有1個女兒。他於1400年被列為bishop of carlisle。他去世於1419年8月30日在英國波藍德卡萊爾享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Strickland于大约1330年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.44岁，母亲Cecily Welles30岁。他和Isabel Warcop至少有1个女儿。他于1400年被列为bishop of carlisle。他去世于1419年8月30日在英国波藍德卡萊爾享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Strickland was born about 1330, in England, his father, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., was 44 and his mother, Cecily Welles, was 30. He had at least 1 daughter with Isabel Warcop. In 1400, his occupation is listed as bishop of carlisle. He died on 30 August 1419, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Strickland est né environ 1330, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., avait 44 ans et sa mère, Cecily Welles, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Isabel Warcop. En 1400, sa profession de son indiquée est bishop of carlisle. Il est décédé le 30 août 1419, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Strickland um 1330 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. 44 und seine Mutter Cecily Welles 30. Er hatte mit Isabel Warcop mindestens 1 Tochter. 1400 ist sein Beruf als bishop of carlisle aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. August 1419 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, England und wurde in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Strickland è nato il circa 1330 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Welles, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Isabel Warcop. Nel 1400, la sua occupazione è indicata come bishop of carlisle. Morì il 30 agosto 1419, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Carlisle, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stricklandが約1330年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.は44歳，母Cecily Wellesは30歳であった。彼はIsabel Warcopとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。1400年，職業はbishop of carlisleと記録されている。彼は1419年8月30日にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Strickland(이)가 대략 1330년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Welles(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Isabel Warcop(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1400년, 그의 직업은 bishop of carlisle이었다. 그는 1419년 8월 30일 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에 묻혔다.

pt.before 15 August 1400-30 August 1419: de 15 de agosto de 1400 a 30 de agosto de 1419
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Strickland nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Strickland Knt., tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Welles, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Isabel Warcop. Em 1400, sua profissão aparece como bishop of carlisle. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1419, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Strickland родился около 1330 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Welles, 30. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Isabel Warcop. В 1400 году он работал по профессии bishop of carlisle. Он умер 30 августа 1419 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Isabel Warcop. En 1400, su ocupación registrada era bishop of carlisle. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1419, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
